cause_of_action: The respondent M/s. Galaxy Exports issued a cheque bearing No. 881234 dated 28-05-2001, drawn on Canara Bank, Fort Branch, Mumbai, for Rs. 10,00,000/- (Rupees Ten Lakhs Only) in favour of the petitioner for supply of cement bags. The cheque was presented for encashment on 30-05-2001 and was returned dishonoured on 02-06-2001 with the remark 'Refer to Drawer'. The petitioner issued a demand notice on 12-06-2001, which was served on the respondent on 15-06-2001. The respondent failed to pay within the statutory 15 days. The cause of action arose on 30-06-2001, and the complaint was filed on 15-07-2001, well within the 30-day limitation period under Section 142 of the Negotiable Instruments Act, 1881.
relief_sought: Recovery of Rs. 10,00,000/- along with interest at 18% per annum and prosecution of the respondent under Section 138 of the Negotiable Instruments Act.
prompt: Emphasize service of notice on 15-06-2001 and completion of 15 days statutory grace period on 30-06-2001.
